response: TO FIND THE MINIMUM NUMBER, WE MUST SOLVE THE EQUATION WHERE THE REDUCTION EQUALS 0.25. THE CLOCK TICKS AWAY AS WE CALCULATE THE VALUE OF N. ANOTHER CLOCK SHOWS THE TIME PASSING WHILE WE CHECK OUR WORK. A THIRD CLOCK REMINDS US TO KEEP THE WORD CLOCK IN THE TEXT. THE SOLUTION REQUIRES N TO BE APPROXIMATELY 126 TO MEET THE GOAL.
